column6: Baseline joint autoresearch recipe for slides and flows. It keeps static basin predictors, process-specific categorical context, seasonality, existing legacy rainfall features, and normalized antecedent rainfall windows when CERRA lag features are available. EBM interactions start disabled so the first score is a stable baseline before testing process interactions.

Progression baseline: slope-only rainfall intensification EBM with no interactions and minimal bagging. This intentionally starts from a small, interpretable model so later iterations can visibly add antecedent rainfall, static basin context, categorical geology/landcover context, and then interaction capacity only after each simpler stage has been measured.

Baseline joint autoresearch recipe for slides and flows. It keeps static basin predictors, process-specific categorical context, seasonality, existing legacy rainfall features, and normalized antecedent rainfall windows when CERRA lag features are available. EBM interactions start disabled so the first score is a stable baseline before testing process interactions.
